name: Yellow Baboon, Archer of the Forest
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>狩</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>うど</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イエロー・バブーン

desc: When a Beast-Type monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can remove from play 2 Beast-Type monsters in your Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.
mnst_eff: When a Beast-Type monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can remove from play 2 Beast-Type monsters in your Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.
eff: When a Beast-Type monster you control is destroyed by battle and sent to the Graveyard, you can remove from play 2 Beast-Type monsters in your Graveyard to Special Summon this card from your hand.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
